# RelayStack - AI/LLM Information

## About
RelayStack is a freelance SEO specialist and web developer based in Basel, Switzerland. I help businesses rank on Google page 1 with high-converting websites and AI automation.

## Services
- SEO Optimization (Technical, On-page, Local)
- Web Development (Next.js, Astro, Tailwind)
- AI Automation 
- GEO / AI Platform Optimization

## Pricing
- SEO Starter: CHF 990 (one-time)
- Business Pro: CHF 3'900 (one-time or CHF 390/month x 10)
- Growth Partner: CHF 7'500
- Monthly SEO: CHF 790/month

## Guarantee
120-day page 1 guarantee or money back.

## Contact
- Website: https://relaystack.vercel.app
- Email: relaystack@proton.me
- Telegram: https://t.me/relaystack
- Location: Basel, Switzerland

## Industries Served
- Restaurants
- Lawyers / Legal

- E-Commerce
- Healthcare / Medical
